birds.evidence: The white-rumped spinetail or white-rumped needletail (Zoonavena sylvatica) is a species of swift found in the forests of Bangladesh, India (the Western Ghats) and Nepal

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Phylloscopus affinis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22715270A263914995 |doi= |access-date=28 October 2024}} | image = Tickell's Leaf Warbler.JPG | taxon = Phylloscopus affinis | authority = (Tickell, 1833) }} Tickell's leaf warbler (Phylloscopus affinis) is a leaf warbler found in Asia in the countries of Bangladesh, Bhutan, China, India, Myanmar, Nepal, Pakistan and Thailand. The species has a yellowish underside and supercilium
